allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Complete PriceCheck monorepo: Extension, Backend, Landing

Extension:
- React + Vite Chrome extension with manifest v3
- Full UI: LoadingNarrative, ScoreDisplay, TacticCard, SplitScreen, TrustBadge, ScamView
- Content script extracts page data natively
- Wired to backend API with error handling

Backend:
- FastAPI with LangGraph pipeline \(9 nodes, conditional routing\)
- Trust layer: domain age, brand mismatch, price implausibility, contact checks
- Claude API integration for manipulation detection
- Scoring algorithm with category weights
- CORS configured for production \(Netlify, Chrome extension\)
- Deployment: render.yaml and Dockerfile

Landing:
- React + Vite marketing site
- All 6 sections per PRD: Hero, Trust Bar, Demo Result, How It Works, Tactic Cards, CTA
- Fully responsive \(375px mobile tested\)
- Ready for Netlify deployment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
